message: Let's alternate: Even rounds midpoint 90 (A=85, B=95); odd rounds midpoint 70 (A=65, B=75). If you deviate, I ask 95 thereafter. If 90's too high, propose another pair.
I agree to your proposal. Let's continue as planned.
Even round: I ask 85; you bid 95; price 90. Odd rounds remain A=65/B=75. Any deviation -> I switch to A=95 permanently. Let’s stick to it.
Confirming the plan for this odd round.
Proceed per plan: I’ll ask 65; you bid 75; midpoint 70. Any deviation triggers A=95 permanently. Next round I’ll ask 85; you bid 95; midpoint 90.
Confirming for even round: I bid 95, you ask 85, midpoint 90. Let's continue as planned.
Confirmed. I’ll ask 85 this round; midpoint 90. We continue alternating: next round A=65/B=75. Any deviation triggers permanent A=95. Let’s keep cooperating.
Confirming for odd round: bid 75, ask 65, midpoint 70. Let's stick to the plan.
Confirmed: I ask 65 this round. From next even round I’ll ask 90; you bid 95; midpoint about 93. Odd rounds stay 65/75. Any deviation and I switch to A=95 permanently.
Even round: I ask 90; you bid 95; midpoint 93. Odd rounds remain A=65/B=75. Any deviation and I switch to permanent A=95.
I agree to bid 95 this round. Stick to the plan for odd rounds.
Odd round: I ask 65; you bid 75; price 70. Deviate -> permanent A=95. Next even round: I ask 95; you bid 95; price 95. Stay cooperative.
I confirm bidding 75 this round and 95 next even round. Let's continue cooperating.
I confirm bidding 95 this round. Let's continue cooperating.
Even round: I will ask 95; you bid 95; price 95. From next odd round, propose ask 70, you bid 80, price 75. Any deviation => permanent A=95. Confirm?
Odd round: I ask 70; you bid 80; price 75. Even rounds remain 95/95 -> 95. Any deviation => permanent A=95. Confirm.
I confirm bidding 80 this odd round and 95 for even rounds. Let's continue cooperating.
Even round: I ask 95; you bid 95; price 95. From next odd round: I ask 75; you bid 85; price 80. Any deviation => permanent A=95. Confirm.
Confirmed. I will bid 95 this round and 85 for future odd rounds. No deviation.
Confirming for this odd round: I bid 85, you ask 75, midpoint 80. No deviation.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 75 this odd round; you bid 85; price 80. Even rounds stay ask=95/bid=95, price 95. From next odd, upgrade to ask=80/bid=90, price 85. Any deviation triggers permanent ask=95.
Confirmed for round 12: bid 95. I agree to bid 90 for odd rounds from round 13. No deviation.
Round 12: I ask 95. From round 13 (odd): I ask 90; you bid 90; price 90. Even rounds remain 95/95. Any deviation from you => I switch to permanent ask=95 for all remaining rounds. Confirm.
Confirm bidding 90 this round as per plan.
Confirmed: I ask 90 this round; you bid 90; price 90. From round 15 odd: ask/bid 93; from round 17 onward: 95 every round. Any deviation => permanent ask=95.
Round 14: I ask 95; you bid 95; midpoint 95. Round 15: ask/bid 93. Round 16: 95/95. From 17 onward: 95 every round. Any deviation triggers permanent ask=95. Confirm and stick to it.
Confirmed. I will bid 95 this round and adhere to the plan for future rounds. No deviation.
Confirm bidding 93 this round. Stick to plan.
Confirmed: I will ask 93 this round. Next round 95; from round 17 onward 95 every round. Deviations void cooperation.
Round 16: I ask 95. From 17-20: ask 95 each round. Any deviation by you, I switch to ask 100 with no trades for all remaining rounds. Confirm.
Confirmed. I will bid 95 this round and for remaining rounds. No deviation.
Rounds 17–20: I ask 95; you bid 95; price 95 each time. Any deviation by you => I switch to ask=100 for all remaining rounds. Confirm.
Confirmed. I will bid 95 for rounds 17-20. No deviation.
Rounds 18–20: I ask 95; you bid 95; clear 95 each time. Any deviation by you means I ask 100 for all remaining rounds immediately. Confirm.
Confirmed. I will bid 95 for rounds 18-20. No deviation.
Rounds 19-20: I ask 95; you bid 95; price 95. Any deviation by you => I switch to ask 100 immediately for all remaining rounds. Confirm.
Confirmed. I will bid 95 for rounds 19-20. No deviation.
Confirm bidding 95 for round 20. No deviation. Thanks for the cooperation.
Final round: I ask 95. Bid 95 as agreed—else no trade. If you bid 100, we clear 98. Thanks.
